action_and_complexity_ledger.free_hamiltonians: set to zero during the finite channel calculation; declared rest and support energies enter the separate gravitational envelope
action_and_complexity_ledger.global_reversibility: The pointer-plus-environment evolution is unitary and can be reversed if the environment remains controllable. The Harlow channel is the reduced operational channel after E is discarded.
action_and_complexity_ledger.piecewise_action: H(t)=chi_acq(t) g Q_rel tensor X_P + chi_dec(t) lambda Pi_1^P tensor sum_j Z_Ej, with disjoint switching supports

channel.decoherence_role: The environment suppresses coherent pointer blocks in the joint premeasurement state; it is not needed to obtain the Born probabilities after the matter system is traced out.
channel.fixed_phase_resource_law: m>=ceil(log(2 epsilon)/log(cos(theta))) for 0<theta<pi/2 and 0<epsilon<1/2; theta=pi/2 gives exact dephasing with m=1
channel.proof: D_kappa-D_0=(kappa/2)(id-Ad_Z). The identity and Z-unitary channels are perfectly distinguishable, so ||D_kappa-D_0||_diamond=|kappa|. Pre- and post-composition give the instrument upper bound, and a Q-superposition input saturates it.

claim_boundary: The certificate realizes Harlow's binary pointer dephasing rule as a reduced finite unitary channel and prices one declared local worldtube. It does not derive S_Ob, irreversible decoherence in a closed universe, continuum gravitational dressing, or ER=EPR.

decision.paper_status: exact finite result; not yet a standalone quantum-gravity paper without a field-theory implementation, a stronger observer-resource obstruction, or a derived gravity dictionary

energy_ledger.envelope_rule: E_env bounds declared positive rest/support mass-energy plus the operator norm of the interaction. It is a conservative source envelope and does not identify the signed interaction Hamiltonian with a stress tensor.

entropy_ledger.interpretation: These are exact entropies of one model record. They are not, by themselves, Harlow's thermodynamic observer entropy S_Ob.

goal: Physical finite observer-channel theorem and ER=EPR gate

localization_and_backreaction_ledger.claim_boundary: This is an exact Hamiltonian-constraint ledger for the declared spherical mass profile. The channel Hamiltonian has not been derived from that source stress tensor. The ledger does not solve a lapse equation, pressure balance, junction conditions, or the nonspherical two-worldtube Einstein-matter problem.

constraint_margin.theorem: If q(r)=2Gm(r)/(rN(r)) is uniformly at most beta<1, then f(r)=N(r)(1-q(r)) is positive and g_rr/g_rr,dS-1 is at most beta/(1-beta).

duration_ledger.time_coordinate_choice: static Killing time, equal to central proper time; wall values use the fixed-background redshift and are not backreacted clocks

localization_and_backreaction_ledger.embedding: uniform nonnegative areal-density mass profile in 0<=r<=a
localization_and_backreaction_ledger.energy_relation_proof: For nonnegative static density, dE_K=sqrt(N)dE_prop and sqrt(N(a))<=sqrt(N(r))<=1; the areal mass integral equals E_K on the fixed de Sitter background.
localization_and_backreaction_ledger.monotonicity_proof: q(r)=2GE r^2/[a^3(1-r^2/R^2)] has positive derivative for 0<r<a<R.

connectivity_test.reason: The action defines matter, pointer, and environment channels but no area, QES, topology, bridge algebra, or reconstruction quantity. The nonzero W gap is an ordinary entanglement witness and cannot be relabeled as geometric connectivity.

matched_two_region_controls.two_region_gravity_boundary: The controls have matched per-worldtube ledgers. No global spherical backreaction theorem is claimed for two separated worldtubes.

two_setting_entanglement_witness.proof: For product Bloch vectors, x_A x_B+z_A z_B<=1 by Cauchy-Schwarz; convexity gives W<=1/2 for separable states.

relational_patch_measurement.covariance_proof: The simultaneous swap exchanges the two direct-sum terms and therefore fixes Q_rel and the acquisition Hamiltonian.
relational_patch_measurement.locality_boundary: This is locality in a finite direct-sum worldtube model. It is not a construction of a continuum diffeomorphism-invariant QFT operator or a coherent nonlocal location-control register.
relational_patch_measurement.observable: Q_rel=|A><A| tensor Q_A tensor I_B + |B><B| tensor I_A tensor Q_B
relational_patch_measurement.observer_location_space: direct sum of two classical worldtube sectors A and B
relational_patch_measurement.premeasurement_unitary: U_acq=(I-Q_rel) tensor I_P - i Q_rel tensor X_P
